package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_record_debug_log_in_batch: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag debug logging per batch record on hot ingestion paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule563NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario563Negative(records []Rule563NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
